archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast (Archetype 4) fused with Developer Luxury (Archetype 5)
design_philosophy: Premium, authoritative, and clean. Minimalist developer portfolio style focusing on extreme typography, subtle micro-interactions, and refined glassmorphism. 'Clean beats flashy'.

scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-heading font-extrabold tracking-tighter
scale.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-heading font-bold tracking-tight

layout_and_spacing.spacing_system: Generous Spacing: Use py-24 or py-32 for section padding. Use gap-8 or gap-12 for grids.

grid_modes.projects: Bento Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6 or gap-8
grid_modes.skills: Flex wrap with gap-3, or grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-6
grid_modes.general: Single-column narrative for About and Education

cards.hover_state: hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-white/20 (dark) hover:border-black/15 (light) transition-all duration-300 ease-out

buttons.primary: Monochrome contrast. Dark: bg-white text-black hover:bg-gray-200. Light: bg-black text-white hover:bg-gray-800. rounded-md px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-border hover:bg-surface rounded-md px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-colors

badges_tags.style: font-mono text-xs uppercase tracking-widest px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full border border-border bg-surface text-text_secondary

navigation.style: Sticky Crystal Glass header (z-50). backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 dark:bg-black/60 border-b border-border.

motion_and_interactions.entrance: Staggered fade-up for lists and grids. Use Framer Motion (`initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}`).
motion_and_interactions.hover: Scale-[1.02] on interactive cards, subtle opacity shifts on links.
motion_and_interactions.scroll: Smooth scrolling (use lenis if possible, or scroll-behavior: smooth in CSS).

sections.name: Hero
sections.content: Name (Anuj Biswas), Headline (AI & Machine Learning Enthusiast | BTech CS+AI @ NSIT Dwarka).
sections.design: Extreme typography. Huge name. Mono font for the university/role label. Subtle radial background gradient. CTA buttons: 'View Projects' (primary), 'Contact Me' (secondary).

sections.name: About
sections.content: Brief bio emphasizing AI/ML focus, problem-solving, and passion for building systems.
sections.design: Large, readable text block (text-xl to text-2xl). Keep it clean and narrative-focused.

sections.name: Skills
sections.content: Programming Languages, Frameworks & Libraries, Databases, Tools & Platforms, Soft Skills.
sections.design: Use clean minimalist badges or a structured grid. Avoid generic progress bars.

sections.name: Now Learning / Currently Building
sections.content: Replaces Experience. Focus on RAG, advanced LLMs, or active learning goals.
sections.design: Timeline format or a distinct highlighted 'Active' card. Minimalist and forward-looking.

sections.name: Projects
sections.content: Multimodal Fake News Detection, AI Resume Analyzer, GitHub Analyzer.
sections.design: Bento Grid cards. Prominent titles, tech stack badges, and GitHub/Live links.

sections.name: Education
sections.content: BTech CS+AI at NSIT Dwarka (2024-2028), New Delhi.
sections.design: Clean timeline item. Right-aligned dates or structured rows.

sections.name: Achievements
sections.design: Minimal list with icons (e.g., Lucide check-circle or trophy).

sections.name: Contact
sections.content: Contact form (Name, Email, Message), Email link, LinkedIn, GitHub, Download Resume CTA.
sections.design: Sleek, customized Shadcn form inputs. Big typography for email ('hello@...').

image_urls.description: Abstract wavy dark shapes. Can be used with low opacity (10-20%) as a fixed background texture in dark mode to avoid pure flat black.
Texture of contemporary building with geometric lines. Good for subtle abstract section backgrounds.

media.icons_strategy: Use 'lucide-react' for minimal, clean UI icons (external links, github, linkedin, mail, download). Use uniform stroke-width (1.5 or 2).

instructions_to_main_agent: DO NOT USE Inter font. Apply the provided Fontshare/Google Fonts imports in the global CSS.
Configure Tailwind with the exact font families (font-heading for Cabinet Grotesk, font-body for Satoshi, font-mono for JetBrains Mono).
Implement a robust Dark/Light mode toggle (using next-themes or manually via Tailwind 'dark' class).
Use Framer Motion for elegant, staggered entrance animations on all major sections.
Rely strictly on the provided resume content. Do not invent dates, companies, or metrics.
Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) using kebab-case role-based names (e.g., data-testid='contact-submit-button').
Customize Shadcn components (if used) to match the premium, monochrome, glassmorphic aesthetic. Remove default blue focus rings and replace with black/white focus rings.
